hooks.command: echo '⚠️  Guard: verify this bash command is safe before running'
if ls src/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; then source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null && ruff check src/ --output-format concise 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [ -f pyproject.toml ] && [ -d tests ]; then source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  Tests failed or not runnable yet'; fi
if ls src/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; then source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null && ruff check src/ --output-format concise 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Lint clean' || echo '⚠️  Lint issues found'; fi
echo '🐍 Python (venv): '"$(source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null && python3 --version 2>&1 || echo 'venv not active')"'; uv: '"$(uv --version 2>&1)"
